layoutRegions.name: authorization-hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize archive purge thaw authorization posture and expose the resume authorization action.

layoutRegions.name: request-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare thaw authorization requests, freeze release attestations, hold clearances, and delegated resume approvals.

layoutRegions.name: resume-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect retry hash thaw proofs, checksum acceptance unlocks, and rollback-safe purge resume packet exhibits.

components.name: RequestCard
components.purpose: Thaw authorization request summary with clearance, resume approval, and authorization progress.
interactions: status chip highlights authorize, ready, or review state
progress bar communicates authorization readiness without layout shift

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense row for freeze release attestations, hold clearances, resume approvals, and checksum unlocks.
interactions: state label remains visible at narrow widths
row content stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: ResumePacket
components.purpose: Rollback-safe command and exhibit checklist for authorizing purge execution resume.
interactions: packet fields preserve long command text without overlapping neighboring panels
checklist remains readable on mobile and desktop

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
